Added position-level product tagging (FK to enterprise_product_taxonomy) to capture granular product type (e.g. Revolving Loan, Term Loan). Facility-level product_node_id remains for parent product groups.

Added total exposure amount for facilities flagged as CRITICIZED within each LOB. Complements the existing criticized_portfolio_count (which was already in the DDL but had no population SQL). Population procedure l3.populate_lob_credit_quality_criticized now computes both fields.

Added total exposure amount for criticized facilities to the deterioration summary. Population procedure l3.populate_lob_deterioration_criticized now computes both criticized_portfolio_count and criticized_exposure_amt.
